title: 1951–52 FK Partizan season - Wikipedia
body: Partizan 1951–52 football season Partizan 1951–52 [ 1 ] season President Bogdan Vujošević Head coach Toni Pogačnik Yugoslav First League 6th Yugoslav Cup Quarter-finals ← 1950–51 1952–53 → The 1951–52 season was the sixth season in FK Partizan 's existence. This article shows player statistics and matches that the club played during the 1951–52 season. Players [ edit ] Squad information [ edit ] Friendlies [ edit ] 1.
